klmWeylConventionStatus.label: hbar=1 Weyl/KLM convention fixed
klmWeylConventionStatus.reason: The ledger uses the hbar=1 symplectic phase convention.  In this normalization the KLM quantum positive-type matrix is the quantum-Bochner positivity condition for the Weyl symbol.

klmWeylEquivalenceStatus.label: KLM positive type equals Weyl operator positivity
klmWeylEquivalenceStatus.reason: For the symplectic Fourier pair (Q,sigma) in the fixed hbar=1 normalization, Q is KLM positive type if and only if Op^W(sigma) is positive semidefinite on the Weyl test domain.

proof: Fix the hbar=1 symplectic Fourier convention used in the ledger.
Use the KLM quantum-Bochner theorem in that convention.
Identify KLM positivity of Q with positivity of Op^W(sigma).
